pages.title: Astra Shop
pages.text: The $(bold)Astra Shop$() is found in the FTB Quest Book as its own chapter.$(br2)Each shop entry consumes Astra Coins and gives you an item in return. Purchases are $(bold)one-time only$() — each item can only be bought once per player.

pages.title: Shop Layout
pages.text: $(bold)Row 1 — Basic (5–30 coins):$() Bread, Bone Meal, Blaze Rods, Golden Apples, Ender Pearls, Lapis, String.$(br2)$(bold)Row 2 — Resources (25–65 coins):$() Iron, Gold, Diamonds, IE Steel, Obsidian, XP Levels, Emeralds.$(br2)$(bold)Row 3 — Late-Game (80–300 coins):$() Ancient Debris, Totem of Undying, Astra Field Blade, Astra Armor Set, Nether Star, Elytra.
